Item Details:

## sidebar-02

A sidebar with collapsible sections.

**Type:** registry:block
**Files:** 4 file(s)

visual_summary: This is a customizable sidebar component with multiple collapsible sections. It is ideal for organizing content and providing quick access to features in a navigation-rich application. The siderbar can be easily styled and expanded to accommodate various use cases.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready registry:block component with the following characteristics:

Name: sidebar-02
Description: This is a customizable sidebar component with multiple collapsible sections. It is ideal for organizing content and providing quick access to features in a navigation-rich application. The siderbar can be easily styled and expanded to accommodate various use cases.
Style: e.g. dark, minimal, glassmorphism
Interactions: e.g. hover, expandable, scroll
Tags: responsive, collapsible, navigation, sidebar, configuration

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
